name: Mulberry Ice
recipeIngredient: 1 zest of 1 lemon, cut into strips
1/2 cup fresh ginger, thinly sliced (4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, sugar, lemon zest, and ginger in a heavy saucepan.
2. Boil the mixture for about 5 minutes.
3. Add the mulberries and bring back to a boil.
4. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Puree briefly using a food processor or blender.
6. Strain the mixture to remove solids.
7. Rub the berries gently to release all juice.
8. Stir in 1/4 cup port wine (or more) and 1/4 cup lemon juice (or more).
9. Taste and adjust sweetness with additional sugar if needed, or add more lemon juice as desired.
10. Freeze the mixture in an ice cream maker or churn until firm.
11. Garnish with a splash of port or a squeeze of lemon juice before serving.
Yields 5 1/2 cups.
